Assembly macros, functions for system calls, and POSIX platform-specific functions for Jerry libc.


## Files
- **[jerry-asm.S](jerry-asm.S.md)**: Assembly macros and functions for system calls and jump operations on various architectures and OS.
- **[jerry-libc-target.c](jerry-libc-target.c.md)**: POSIX implementation of platform-specific functions for Jerry libc, including file and process operations.
